seams: H-KN1 equivalence (the deflationary reading): |lift(kernel) - lift(best aligned non-NSM store)| < 0.05 (TOST, one-sided 95% BCa bounds both inside the margin) => the verify-retry lift is store-content-generic - recorded as verdict NULL with the same prominence as a PASS (design doc maps this to PASS-GENERIC)

H-KN2 superiority (the content reading, ASM-1083 token-matched guard): lift(kernel) - lift(best) > 0.05 one-sided (BCa LB > +0.05) AND lift(kernel) - lift(best_matched) > 0.05 one-sided (BCa LB > +0.05; best_matched = the eligible token-matched arm - plain-padded if it passes its difficulty gate, else opaque - with the larger point lift) => NSM content carries weight beyond alignment AND beyond token budget at this scope - verdict PASS (design doc: PASS-CONTENT); no eligible token-matched arm => superiority unavailable (length_guard_available false); the inverse (kernel INFERIOR beyond margin, BCa UB < -0.05) is a registered outcome - verdict FAIL (deflationary a fortiori: NSM surface is a net cost at matched alignment and at no greater token budget)

H-KN3 bridge: the kernel arm reproduces the f2b mechanism signature on regenerated surfaces - verify-retry lift over R1-alone one-sided 95% BCa LB > +0.05 (instrument gate, failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never a hypothesis event) and shuffled-derangement recovery < 0.30 (Holm secondary, the f2b bound verbatim)
summary: Experiment knull-v2: verdict NULL. Coverage fraction 0.3542 on rung molecules-v0 (measured scope only). Kill criterion (verbatim): K-NULL verbatim kills (verdict-enum mapping: NULL carries PASS-GENERIC, PASS carries PASS-CONTENT, FAIL carries KERNEL-INFERIOR; equal prominence for all outcomes): (a) bridge gate fails (kernel-arm lift LB <= +0.05 on regenerated surfaces) => INSTRUMENT-INVALID - the f2b mechanism did not reproduce, nothing to attribute, and the f2b-replicate PASS is NOT thereby contradicted (different surfaces) but a surface-sensitivity flag is raised on the F2 line; (b) TOST passes (verdict NULL) => the kernel-content attribution DIES at this scope - the f2b lift is licensed as a generic aligned-deterministic-answer-key + retry effect at no greater - possibly smaller - token budget than the kernel store (ASM-1084), all forward narration adopts that phrase, and F2-line investment re-routes to authoring-cost economics (the narrowed efficiency reading) and to f2b-transfer; (c) kernel-INFERIOR beyond margin (UB < -0.05, verdict FAIL) => same deflationary consequence as (b) PLUS NSM surface is a measured net cost at matched alignment and at no greater token budget (ASM-1084) - the strongest anti-content outcome; (d) ALL aligned arms (plain, plain-padded, opaque) fail the difficulty band => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, redesign the stores (forks F-KN-B/F-KN-C), mint a new id; nulls and positives get equal prominence. Extrapolation envelope (verbatim): Binding on ANY outcome: claims are scoped to <=1.7B hosts (verify host 135M; 1.7B only as the bridge baseline), the kernel-covered SELF-AUTHORED templated definitional-QA family over the same 108 covered concepts, k=4, this normalization/accept machinery (norm_text string identity + segment membership), and the oracle-favourable construction HELD FIXED BY DESIGN in every arm - verbatim: on the D-QA slice the verifier's accept test is string-equality to the same canonical record that DEFINED the gold answer, so its measured lift is inflated by the eval's construction; K-NULL varies only WHAT the store says, never that construction, so NO outcome here speaks to gold-label independence (f2b-transfer's question), to externally-authored items, to non-templated phrasings, to hosts >1.7B, or to any other corpus. Natural-length scope (ASM-1084): the plain arm is authored at natural concise dictionary length under the Option-B ruling, so token-budget parity is NOT a property of the kernel-vs-plain contrast; parity is enforced through the token-matched arms (plain-padded, opaque; ASM-1085) and the superiority read is length-guarded through them (ASM-1083) - no claim here speaks to what NSM content buys at UNmatched token budgets beyond the descriptive length reads. Equivalence (NULL) licenses the relabel of the f2b lift as a generic aligned-deterministic-answer-key + retry effect at no greater token budget AT THIS SCOPE and nothing wider; superiority (PASS) licenses NSM-content contribution >= 0.05 absolute AT THIS SCOPE and says nothing about semantics-in-general or transfer. Coverage disclosure (mandatory, verbatim): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0 - MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, NOT general coverage; every accuracy claim is bounded to the kernel-covered slice. Two host rungs license a SIGN, not a slope.
title: Registry verdict: knull-v2
